'''鈭歬-g-th''' ('''kakagath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyclize|cyclize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyclize|cyclize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-g-th
|-
! Lemma
| kakagath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikagath|thikagath]] || [[word:jikagath|jikagath]] || [[word:shikagath|shikagath]] || [[word:kikagath|kikagath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukagath|thuthukagath]] || [[word:jujukagath|jujukagath]] || [[word:shushukagath|shushukagath]] || [[word:kukukagath|kukukagath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukagath|thukagath]] || [[word:jukagath|jukagath]] || [[word:shukagath|shukagath]] || [[word:kukagath|kukagath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukagath|thukagath]] || [[word:jukagath|jukagath]] || [[word:shukagath|shukagath]] || [[word:kukagath|kukagath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekagath|thekagath]] || [[word:jekagath|jekagath]] || [[word:shekagath|shekagath]] || [[word:kekagath|kekagath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokagath|thothokagath]] || [[word:jojokagath|jojokagath]] || [[word:shoshokagath|shoshokagath]] || [[word:kokokagath|kokokagath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokagath|thokagath]] || [[word:jokagath|jokagath]] || [[word:shokagath|shokagath]] || [[word:kokagath|kokagath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokagath|thokagath]] || [[word:jokagath|jokagath]] || [[word:shokagath|shokagath]] || [[word:kokagath|kokagath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]] || [[word:kagath|kagath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kagath|th忙kagath]] || [[word:j忙kagath|j忙kagath]] || [[word:sh忙kagath|sh忙kagath]] || [[word:k忙kagath|k忙kagath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakagath|thathakagath]] || [[word:jajakagath|jajakagath]] || [[word:shashakagath|shashakagath]] || [[word:kakakagath|kakakagath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakagath|thakagath]] || [[word:jakagath|jakagath]] || [[word:shakagath|shakagath]] || [[word:kakagath|kakagath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakagath|thakagath]] || [[word:jakagath|jakagath]] || [[word:shakagath|shakagath]] || [[word:kakagath|kakagath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakagath|shakagath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakagath|goshakagath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakagath|gokishakagath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakagathn眉|shakagathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakagathnkn眉|goshakagathnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakagathn眉|gokishakagathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakagathsh毛|shakagathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakagathnksh毛|goshakagathnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakagathsh毛|gokishakagathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakagathro|shakagathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakagathnkro|goshakagathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakagathro|gokishakagathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakagathmu|shakagathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakagathnkmu|goshakagathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakagathmu|gokishakagathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakagathsher|shakagathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakagathnksher|goshakagathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakagathsher|gokishakagathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakagathng|shakagathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakagathnkng|goshakagathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakagathng|gokishakagathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakagathya|shakagathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakagathnkya|goshakagathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakagathya|gokishakagathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakagathyam|shakagathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakagathnkyam|goshakagathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakagathyam|gokishakagathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakagathn眉sh毛|shakagathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakagathnkn眉sh毛|goshakagathnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakagathn眉sh毛|gokishakagathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakagathn眉ro|shakagathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakagathnkn眉ro|goshakagathnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakagathn眉ro|gokishakagathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakagathn眉mu|shakagathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakagathnkn眉mu|goshakagathnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakagathn眉mu|gokishakagathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakagathsh毛n眉|shakagathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakagathnksh毛n眉|goshakagathnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakagathsh毛n眉|gokishakagathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakagathsh毛ro|shakagathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakagathnksh毛ro|goshakagathnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakagathsh毛ro|gokishakagathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakagathsh毛mu|shakagathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakagathnksh毛mu|goshakagathnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakagathsh毛mu|gokishakagathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakagathron眉|shakagathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakagathnkron眉|goshakagathnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakagathron眉|gokishakagathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakagathrosh毛|shakagathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakagathnkrosh毛|goshakagathnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakagathrosh毛|gokishakagathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakagathromu|shakagathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakagathnkromu|goshakagathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakagathromu|gokishakagathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakagathmun眉|shakagathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakagathnkmun眉|goshakagathnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakagathmun眉|gokishakagathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakagathmush毛|shakagathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakagathnkmush毛|goshakagathnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakagathmush毛|gokishakagathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakagathmuro|shakagathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakagathnkmuro|goshakagathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakagathmuro|gokishakagathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
